pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which dynamically writes the specifications to this file path.
Verified from setup_task.sh and verifier.py which instruct the agent to save the final calculation here and check this exact path.
Verified via standard LM317 formula calculation: R2 = 240 * (9 / 1.25 - 1) = 1488.
Verified from verifier.py logic which accepts the metadata tolerance parameter for checking the R2 value.
Verified from setup_task.sh which dynamically writes TARGET OUTPUT: 9 V to the specs file.
Verified from setup_task.sh which dynamically writes REF RESISTOR (R1): 240 Ohms to the specs file.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated project specifications file located at /sdcard/Download/project_specs.txt. The specifications explicitly require a target output voltage of 9V and a reference resistor (R1) of 240 Ohms. The expected calculated adjustment resistor (R2) is precisely 1488 Ohms, derived from the standard LM317 voltage regulator formula. The final result must be saved to /sdcard/lm317_design.txt and is permitted a tolerance of 10 Ohms.
